sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39086" key="e)pigrammh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιγραμμ-ή</orth>,<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ἡ</foreign>,in pl., <sense id="n39086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">markings</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καθ᾽ ὅλον τὸ σῶμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
